title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at AU Small Finance Bank Capital India - 2026 Batch
company: AU Small Finance Bank Capital India

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at AU Small Finance Bank Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with AU Small Finance Bank Capital India! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Bengaluru team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About AU Small Finance Bank Capital India:
AU Small Finance Bank Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in SAP FICO

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AU Small Finance Bank Capital India!
